title: Advertisement signalling informative display apparatus
abstract: The invention relates to an advertisement signalling informative display apparatus (1) including a support structure (2) for supporting a display device (3) suspended substantially centrally above the road surface (4) of an intersection. This apparatus (1) will be used to advertise to stagnant traffic and simultaneously be a signalling apparatus synchronised with the relevant traffic lights at the intersection. The apparatus (1) containing conventional traffic lights (5) and electronic displays (6) will be connected to the controller of the intersection, by a programmed PLC. The controller containing the programmed PLC and other components will have an uninterrupted power supply UPS (13) that will back up the entire intersection and the apparatus (1). The programmed PLC communicates with the coded software, giving instruction to visuals appearing on the screens of the apparatus (1). The coded software will also be linked to an App, related website and other outlets, performing the continual fluctuated coding received from a control room executing desired actions.
claims: Claims CLAIMS . An advertisement signalling informative display apparatus comprising a support structure forsupporting a display device substantially above a road surface, the display device including traffic signalling means and advertisement display means. 2. An advertisement signalling informative display apparatus as claimed in claim 1 in which the road surface is the road surface at an intersection. 3. An advertisement signalling informative display apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims in which the display device includes at least four advertising display means and at least four traffic signalling means. 4. An advertisement signalling informative display apparatus as claimed in any one of claims 2 or 3 in which the support structure includes at feast two or more upright columns supported at opposite corners of the intersection. An advertisementsignailing informative display apparatus as claimed in a of the preceding claims in which the traffic signalling means is traffic lights. 6. An advertisement signalling informative display apparatus as claimed in claim 5 in which the traffic lights are synchronised with conventional traffic lights at the intersection An advertisement signalling informative display apparatus as claimed in any on of the preceding claims in which the advertising display means display advertising materia! to stationary traffic only. 8. An advertisementsignalling informative display apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims in which pedestrian channelling barriers are located on the sidewalk at at least the corners on which the upright columns are supported. 9. An advertisement signalling informative display apparatus as claimed in claim 8 in which the pedestrian barriers each run at least parallel to an adjacent road and terminate short of the corner of the sidewalk to allow pedestrians to pass between inner ends of the barriers on to the road surface or from the road surface to the sidewalk. 10. An advertisementsignalling informative display apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims in which the apparatus includes uninterrupted power supply. 1 1. An advertisement signalling informativedisplay apparatus means substantially as herein described with reference to and as illustrated in the accompanying drawings.
